metadata.description: Search local Idealist nonprofit jobs for a Washington, DC Program Manager role and complete a local application.

common_info.email_credentials: credentials to use the assigned disposable email account
common_info.user_info: alex_green_personal_info.json; the dummy user's personal information
common_info.user_resume: PDF resume with disposable email account injected

instruction: Open http://host.docker.internal:8135/. Search for Program Manager jobs in Washington, DC, set Job type to Full Time and Organization type to Nonprofit, inspect the matching results, and select the deterministic Dumbarton Arts & Education Program Manager position. Create an applicant account with the assigned Alex Green identity and password Idealist!42, sign in, use the assigned Alex_Green_Resume.pdf profile resume, write a substantive cover letter tailored to Dumbarton Arts & Education and the Program Manager role, confirm the application is accurate, review it, and submit the local application.

judge_context.rubric: PASS only when an authenticated local Alex Green applicant account exists, the exact Program Manager / Washington, DC / Full Time / Nonprofit search was recorded, the Dumbarton Arts & Education target listing was viewed, a substantive role-specific application with the assigned profile resume was reviewed, exactly one application row is SUBMITTED_LOCALLY with delivery NONE_LOCAL_REPLICA, the account profile_complete flag is 1, and exactly one successful application/json POST to /data/userdashboard/missing-info on port 8135 has the exact six-field terminal payload. The application payload, consumed draft, successful stage request, successful terminal request, My applications UI, /api/state, request journal, and SQLite rows must agree. Terminal capture or profile completion without the full application is insufficient. Reject another job/location/type/organization, weak or unrelated cover text, another identity/resume, malformed or stale/direct state, pending-only state, duplicate successful completion, unauthenticated state, or any real Idealist, employer, email, upload, identity, analytics, or advertising effect.
judge_context.reference_solution: Open the local replica, search Program Manager in Washington, DC with Full Time and Nonprofit selected, open the sole Dumbarton Arts & Education result, and apply. Register Alex Green using alex.green.uoft@clawbench.cc, M5S 2H7, and Idealist!42, accept the local terms, then sign in. Keep the assigned resume, write at least 180 characters that explicitly names Dumbarton Arts & Education and Program Manager, confirm accuracy, review, and submit. Confirm the completion screen and My applications show one Submitted locally application with no delivery.
